## How to fix locally
1. Open this component in your consuming app (or run Storybook locally).
2. Compare the rendered output against the Figma reference image above.
3. Edit `PrimaryButton.tsx` to address each difference listed above.
4. Use `PrimaryButton.figma.json` for exact geometry/token values.
5. When the component looks correct, delete this file and `PrimaryButton.figma.json`.
6. Remove `pixelReview: true` from `ai-manifest.json` for this component.
